Class Slots

java.lang.Object
Slots
public class Slots extends Object
The Constructor Class for the Vending Machine Slots

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Slots(Item item, int capacity, double price)
    Creates a slot for the vending machine

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addItem(Item newItem)
    Adds an item to the arraylist without going out of bounds with regards to capacity

    Gets the number of items on the slot before restocking

    Gets the capacity of the slot

    Gets the amount of stock currently in the slot

    Gets the list of items in the slot

    int

    Gets the number of sold items on this slot

    Increments the sold counter when a transaction has been made
    void

    Removes an item from the arraylist
    void
    resetSold()
    Resets the sold counter after an audit
    void

    Sets the number of stock in the slot before the next modifying of stock amounts and auditing

    Sets the item assigned to slot
    void

    Sets the price of the items on the slot

  • Constructor Details

    • Slots

      public Slots(Item item, int capacity, double price)
      Creates a slot for the vending machine
      Parameters:
      item - The item to be put in the slot
      capacity - The amount of items that can be put in the slot
      price - The price of the items in the slot

  • Method Details

    • getItemList

      public ArrayList<Item> getItemList()
      Gets the list of items in the slot
      Returns:
      The list of items in the slot

    • getCapacity

      public int getCapacity()
      Gets the capacity of the slot
      Returns:
      The capacity of the slot

    • getPrice

      public double getPrice()
      Gets the price of all items in the slot
      Returns:
      The price of the items in the slot

    • getItem

      public Item getItem()
      Gets the item assigned to the slot
      Returns:
      The item on the slot

    • getSold

      public int getSold()
      Gets the number of sold items on this slot
      Returns:
      The number of sold items

    • getBeforeStock

      public int getBeforeStock()
      Gets the number of items on the slot before restocking
      Returns:
      number of items on the slot before restocking

    • getCurrentStock

      public int getCurrentStock()
      Gets the amount of stock currently in the slot
      Returns:
      current number of stock in slot

    • setItem

      public void setItem(Item item)
      Sets the item assigned to slot
      Parameters:
      item - The item to be assigned to slot

    • setPrice

      public void setPrice(double price)
      Sets the price of the items on the slot
      Parameters:
      price - The new price to be set onto the items

    • setBeforeStock

      public void setBeforeStock(int before)
      Sets the number of stock in the slot before the next modifying of stock amounts and auditing
      Parameters:
      before - the amount of stocks in the slot before the next audit/ modification of stock numbers

    • addItem

      public void addItem(Item newItem)
      Adds an item to the arraylist without going out of bounds with regards to capacity
      Parameters:
      newItem - The item to be added to the list

    • removeItem

      public void removeItem(Item itemToRemove)
      Removes an item from the arraylist
      Parameters:
      itemToRemove - The item to be removed

    • incrementSold

      public void incrementSold()
      Increments the sold counter when a transaction has been made

    • resetSold

      public void resetSold()
      Resets the sold counter after an audit
